questions.question: This 1988 prehistoric adventure film tells of Littlefoot's struggle against a 'Sharptooth.'
This fighting game franchise features Cyrax and Sub-Zero.
Quentin Tarantino's 'Kill Bill: Volume 1' features this actress as O-Ren Ishii, the deadly head of the Japanese Yakuza.
Along with Alicia Silverstone, this actress and former model notably stars in the 1993 music video for Aerosmith's song 'Crazy.'
